name: trello-mcp
description: View, create, and manage your Trello cards directly from Claude

api_key.title: Trello API Key
api_key.description: Your Trello API key from https://trello.com/app-key

token.title: Trello Token
token.description: Your Trello personal token (generate from https://trello.com/app-key)

board_id.title: Trello Board ID
board_id.description: The full ID of the Trello board to manage (run: curl "https://api.trello.com/1/members/me/boards?key=KEY&token=TOKEN&fields=id,name")

tools.name: list_boards
tools.description: List all accessible Trello boards

tools.name: get_board
tools.description: Get the configured board with its lists and card counts

tools.name: get_list_cards
tools.description: Get all open cards in a named list

tools.name: search_cards
tools.description: Search cards across all lists by keyword (max 1000 results)

tools.name: get_card
tools.description: Get full card details including description, due date, labels, checklists, and comments

tools.name: create_card
tools.description: Create a new card in a named list

tools.name: update_card
tools.description: Update a card's name, description, or due date

tools.name: move_card
tools.description: Move a card to a different list

tools.name: archive_card
tools.description: Archive a card (soft delete — recoverable from the Trello UI)

tools.name: add_label
tools.description: Add a label to a card by name or colour

tools.name: remove_label
tools.description: Remove a label from a card

tools.name: get_checklists
tools.description: Get all checklists and their items for a card

tools.name: create_checklist
tools.description: Add a new checklist to a card

tools.name: add_checklist_item
tools.description: Add an item to a checklist

tools.name: update_checklist_item
tools.description: Mark a checklist item complete or incomplete, or rename it

tools.name: get_comments
tools.description: Get comments on a card (newest first)

tools.name: add_comment
tools.description: Post a comment on a card

tools.name: get_board_members
tools.description: List all members on the configured board

tools.name: assign_member
tools.description: Assign a board member to a card by username or full name

tools.name: unassign_member
tools.description: Remove a member from a card

tools.name: get_attachments
tools.description: List URL attachments on a card

tools.name: add_url_attachment
tools.description: Add a URL attachment to a card
